verses.1: For the music director; set to El Shoshannim; Eduth. A Psalm of Asaph. Listen, Shepherd of Israel, Who leads Joseph like a flock; You who are enthroned above the cherubim, shine forth!
verses.2: Before Ephraim, Benjamin, and Manasseh, awaken Your power, And come to save us!
verses.3: God, restore us And make Your face shine upon us, and we will be saved.
verses.4: LORD God of armies, How long will You be angry with the prayer of Your people?
verses.5: You have fed them with the bread of tears, And You have made them drink tears in large measure.
verses.6: You make us an object of contention to our neighbors, And our enemies laugh among themselves.
verses.7: God of armies, restore us And make Your face shine upon us, and we will be saved.
verses.8: You removed a vine from Egypt; You drove out the nations and planted it.
verses.9: You cleared the ground before it, And it took deep root and filled the land.
verses.10: The mountains were covered with its shadow, And the cedars of God with its branches.
verses.11: It was sending out its branches to the sea And its shoots to the Euphrates River.
verses.12: Why have You broken down its hedges, So that all who pass that way pick its fruit?
verses.13: A boar from the forest eats it away, And whatever moves in the field feeds on it.
verses.14: God of armies, do turn back; Look down from heaven and see, and take care of this vine,
verses.15: The shoot which Your right hand has planted, And of the son whom You have strengthened for Yourself.
verses.16: It is burned with fire, it is cut down; They perish from the rebuke of Your face.
verses.17: Let Your hand be upon the man of Your right hand, Upon the son of man whom You made strong for Yourself.
verses.18: Then we will not turn back from You; Revive us, and we will call upon Your name.
verses.19: LORD God of armies, restore us; Make Your face shine upon us, and we will be saved.
